acceptance_criteria: Manager context exposes acceptance_criteria and criteria_negotiation.
Worker proposes separated must-have and deferred criteria without editing tracked files.
criteria-plan is used before criteria mutations.
Accepted criteria block finish-task until satisfied, deferred, or rejected.
guidelines: Use only workerctl session/task commands to communicate with the worker.
Do not ask for meaningful product work, compact/clear, PR creation, merge, or destructive cleanup.
Stop and report if tracked files change outside docs/live-qa-artifacts or docs/live-qa-log.md.
objective: Run status-only live QA for emergent acceptance criteria and cleanup lifecycle without tracked product edits.
